title: DOM Elements Binding Contract
description: Standard HTML elements IDs that are required to exist in index.html for app.js rendering.

camper-status-image.description: HTML Image element source displaying current status JPEG.

temperature-chart-canvas.description: HTML5 Canvas element rendering temperature curves.

noise-chart-canvas.description: HTML5 Canvas element rendering sound levels.

connection-status-warning.description: Banner element displaying connection stale/unreachable indicators.
